title: helianthus cultus
intro: Helianthus cultus, also known as Sunflower, is a large annual flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of consuming Helianthus cultus include reducing cholesterol levels, improving heart health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flower capsules, making it a versatile and accessible addition to a healthy diet and wellness routine.
